awake-query-domains
Input

!awake-query-activities startTime="2018-07-01T00:00:00Z" endTime="2018-08-01T00:00:00Z" domainName="kck.st"
Human Readable Output
3. Query domains
Query domains in Awake Security
Base Command
awake-query-domains
Input
Argument Name
name: awake-query-domains

outputs.description: Domain name AwakeSecurity.Domains.created Date the specified domain was created
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.name

outputs.description: Date the specified domain was last updated AwakeSecurity.Domains.registrantOrg Organization of the registrant
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.lastUpdated

outputs.description: Country of the registrant AwakeSecurity.Domains.registrarName Name of the registrar
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.registrantCountry

outputs.description: Address of the WHOIS server AwakeSecurity.Domains.whoisFound bool
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.whoisServer

outputs.description: AwakeSecurity.Domains.deviceCount Number of devices currently interacting with the specified domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.totalDevices
outputs.name: Was this domain found via WHOIS

outputs.description: Total number of devices that have interacted with the specified domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.intelCount Number of matches of imported intel against the specified domain
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: Date of the most recent interaction with the specified domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.nameservers List of authoritative nameservers for the specified domain
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.lastSeen

outputs.description: Notability score of the domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.whiteListed bool
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.notability
